---
title: "Week 11"
date: 04-14-26
description: |
  We will continue learning about statistical intervals.
editor: source
draft: false
---

## Resources

| Lecture   | Slides                       | Annotated  | Video     |
|-----------|------------------------------|------------|-----------|
| Tuesday    | [Slides](../lectures/11a.pdf) | [Slides](../lectures/11a_annotated.pdf) | [Video](https://youtu.be/fcxPP_9xOao) |
